feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: A simple, whitespace theme for academics. Based on [*folio](https://github.com/bogoli/-folio) design.

entry.title: Visiting Researcher at Cambridge University Judge Business School

link.title: Visiting Researcher at Cambridge University Judge Business School

entry.content:
Overview

I had the privilege of working as a visiting researcher at Cambridge University Judge Business School, where I collaborated with Professor Jaideep Prabhu on cutting-edge research in innovation and management. This period was instrumental in developing my research skills and expanding my academic network.

Research Collaboration

During my time at Judge, I worked on a joint research project for publication in Technovation.

Key aspects of this collaboration:

  • Research focus: [Add your research focus/topic here]
  • Methodology: [Describe the research methodology you employed]
  • Key findings: [Highlight the main findings and contributions]
  • Impact: [Discuss the implications of your research]

[Add more details about your research work and outcomes here]

Advanced Qualitative Methods Course

Beyond the research collaboration, I participated in an advanced qualitative methods course offered at Judge Business School.

What I learned:

  • [Add course topics/modules you covered]
  • [Key methodologies and frameworks studied]
  • [Practical applications and case studies]
  • [How this enhanced your research capabilities]

This course provided me with rigorous training in qualitative research design, data collection, and analysis techniques that have significantly strengthened my research toolkit.

Reflections

[Add your personal reflections about this experience, what you learned, how it shaped your future research directions, and your time at Cambridge]

Acknowledgments

I would like to express my gratitude to Professor Jaideep Prabhu for his excellent supervision, insightful guidance, and mentorship during this visiting period. The experience at Cambridge Judge Business School has been invaluable to my development as a researcher.

More details coming soon…
entry.summary: An exciting opportunity as a visiting researcher at Cambridge University Judge Business School under the supervision of Professor Jaideep Prabhu

entry.title: Building on the shoulders of giants: Conceptualizing Open Source Machine Tools

link.title: Building on the shoulders of giants: Conceptualizing Open Source Machine Tools
